summary: App with a globe tab and main tab showing stations. Slogans cycle in the player view and should also cycle in the globe tab. Stations have a perpetual loading bug in the main tab.
known_issues: Stations are perpetually loading in the main tab

new_feature_requests.summary: Cycle slogans in the globe tab
Add the same cycling anti-subscription slogans (with fade transitions) to the GlobeView tab, matching the behavior already implemented in NowPlayingPanel and FullscreenOverlay.

Fix the perpetual loading state for stations in the main (Stations) tab. Stations should either display correctly or show a clear error state — they must not remain stuck in a loading spinner indefinitely.

projectName: Cycle slogans in Globe tab + fix perpetual loading bug in Stations tab
